title: Gaby and Zeek boast playball trophies
bodyText:
SCHOOLS NEWS - Beaumont Early Learning Centre and Preprimary School offers extramural activities to help children develop various life skills.


> One of the activities is playball, which happens every week.


On 30 July, the first of a weekly playball tournament was held, where the winners in their age groups were Gabby Burger (5-6) and Zeek Appels (4-5).

Zeek Appels

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
